rulings.Case Title: LEUA KHAMVAN VS. PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, AUGUST 15, 2007, LINE 17. DEFENDANT WESTERN ENVIRONMENTAL CONSULTANTS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: The motion of WECI is granted. WECI shifted the burden of proof. The liability of WECI is premised on two affirmative acts: an erroneous estimate of the height of the tree and the instruction to top the tree, not fell the tree. As a consequence, plaintiff asserts the claim is not barred by Privette v. Superior Court (1993) 5 Cal.4th 689. However, it does not appear that there is a basis for asserting that WECI owed plaintiff a duty of care. The Court finds the reasoning of Ruiz v. Herman Weissker, Inc. (2005) 130 Cal.App.4th persuasive. The Court has ruled on the objections of WECI. At the request of the parties, the Court will fax the evidentiary rulings before the hearing if the parties request the clerk to do so. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: AUBURN PACIFIC GROUP LLC VS. ERIN BROOKS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, AUGUST 15, 2007, LINE 13. DEFENDANT ERIN BROOKS'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 1061, THE COURT SUSTAINS THE DEMURRER AS THE PARTIES' DISPUTE AS TO THEIR RESPECTIVE RIGHTS AND DUTIES UNDER THE AGREEMENT, THE PET AGREEMENT AND THE RENT ORDINANCE WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COURT OVERRULES THE DEMURRER AS TO THE PARTIES' DISPUTE AS TO THE USE OF THE REAR YARD, THE STORAGE AREA AND REMOVAL OF DEFENDANT'S PERSONAL PROPERTY AND THE PARKING OF DEFENDANT'S MOTOR SCOOTER. TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. =(302/PJM/PB)
